summary: First iteration of full backend + frontend testing for Meghaa's Ladies Salon. 18/18 backend pytest tests passed (100%). Frontend e2e flows all working: home hero, nav links, services categories, booking (multi-service + date/calendar + time + name/phone -> confirmation w/ booking ID + ₹ total), reviews submission, contact form, admin login (wrong + correct password), admin dashboard tabs (Bookings/Services/Messages), admin booking status change, mobile responsive (hamburger + sticky CTA WhatsApp + Call). All success.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: PRD specifies testids like `nav-link-Services` (capitalized) but the actual implementation in Navbar.jsx uses lowercase (`nav-link-services`). Update PRD/data-testids doc to match implementation (lowercased label) to avoid confusion in future automation.
Backend uses @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') which is deprecated in newer FastAPI. Consider migrating to lifespan context manager. Not blocking.

Server.py: logger is referenced inside seed() (line 330,335) but logger is defined later (line 353). Works due to Python late binding at call time, but order is fragile — define logger before app/event handlers.
No rate limiting on public POST endpoints (reviews, contact, bookings) — spam risk in production. Consider adding basic rate limiting or CAPTCHA.
seed_data_creation: Test created: 1 TEST_AdminService (deleted in same test), 1 TEST_Tester review, 1 TEST_Contact contact, 2 TEST bookings (TEST_Booker via API + TEST Booker via UI booking flow). Test data prefixed with TEST_ for cleanup. The booking IDs and review remain in DB but are clearly tagged.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_salon_api.py — run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_salon_api.py -v`. All endpoints verified including auth (x-admin-token header), rating validation (1-5), empty service_ids rejection, booking total computation. Frontend tested via Playwright: data-testids in Navbar use lowercase labels (nav-link-services, not nav-link-Services). Calendar picker uses react-day-picker (button[name='day']). Time select uses Radix Select with [role='option']. Booking confirmation shows [data-testid='booking-confirmation'] with ₹ total. Admin dashboard at /admin reachable after POST /api/admin/login with password megha-salon-admin-2025; token stored in localStorage as 'megha_admin_token'. Mobile sticky CTA testids: sticky-whatsapp, sticky-call. Mobile hamburger: mobile-menu-toggle.
